title: picris helminthioides
intro: Picris helminthioides, also known as Helminthopium or Worm-leaved Picris, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Picris helminthioides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
